error.bid_too_low_#minBid: Your bid is too low. The minimum bid is {minBid}.
error.auction_ended: The auction has already ended. Bids can no longer be placed.
error.unauthorized: Please log in to place a bid.
error.bid_failed: Could not place bid. Please try again later.
error.amount_must_be_integer: Bid amount must be a whole number (smallest currency unit, e.g. grosz).
error.amount_must_be_positive: Bid amount must be greater than 0.
error.amount_too_high: Bid amount exceeds the maximum allowed value.
error.outbid: You have been outbid by a higher offer.
error.owner_cannot_bid: Auction owners cannot bid on their own auctions.
error.already_leading: You are already leading this auction.
error.join_failed: Failed to join the auction room.
error.leave_failed: Failed to leave the auction room.
error.place_failed: Failed to place your bid. Please try again.
error.get_state_failed: Failed to retrieve the auction state.
error.not_in_room: You are not currently in an auction room.
error.rejected_too_low: Bid rejected — amount is too low.
